auth.taglineBody: RemeLearning tracks what you keep forgetting and brings it back right before you lose it.
auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to continue your learning journey
auth.registerSubtitle: Start tracking and improving your English
auth.name: Full name
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Here's what your recordings say about your English - and what to do next.
dashboard.emptyTitle: Let's find your first weak point
dashboard.emptyDescription: Upload a recording and RemeLearning will transcribe it, spot the mistakes you keep repeating, and turn them into weak points and recommendations right here.
dashboard.practiceCalloutSummary: {{count}} weak points found so far - most recently in {{category}}, updated {{time}}.
dashboard.analysisPending: Your recordings are being analyzed - weak points will show up here soon.

recordings.title: Recordings
recordings.subtitle: Upload a recording and we'll transcribe it, then surface the mistakes you tend to repeat.
recordings.uploadDialogDescription: We'll transcribe it and start looking for the mistakes you tend to repeat.
recordings.emptyDescription: Upload your first recording to get a transcript and see your weak points start to take shape.
recordings.dropzoneLabel: Click to browse or drag a file here
recordings.fileRequired: Choose an audio or video file to upload
recordings.fileTooLarge: File is too large. Maximum size is 500MB
recordings.fileInvalidType: Choose an audio or video file

weakPoints.title: Weak points
weakPoints.subtitle: Items you tend to forget, ranked by forgetting score

bandHint.high: You've made this mistake often and it's likely to resurface soon - review it now while it's easy to fix.
bandHint.medium: This is starting to fade. A quick review now will keep it from slipping further.
bandHint.low: Recently reinforced - low risk of forgetting right now.

weakPoints.emptyDescription: That's either a great sign, or you just haven't recorded in this skill yet - keep it up.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Suggested next steps, grouped by skill
recommendations.emptyDescription: Recommendations appear once we spot a recurring or fading weak point here - check back after your next recording.

practice.title: Practice
practice.subtitle: Redo your weakest items and mark whether you got them right
practice.submitSuccess: Great job! Your progress has been recorded
practice.emptyDescription: You don't have any weak points to drill yet. Upload a recording and we'll turn your mistakes into practice cards.
practice.tapToReveal: Tap the card to reveal the tip
practice.flipAriaLabel: Flip the card to reveal the correct form
practice.sourceCaption: From your own mistakes · {{percent}}% forgetting risk
practice.perfectRun: Flawless round - that streak is real

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.subtitle: Type what you hear from real recordings, then let AI turn your misses into targeted listening practice
dictation.startError: Failed to start a dictation session
dictation.adjustFiltersHint: Try a different exam type, skill, level, or topic.
dictation.noAudio: No audio available for this accent
dictation.feedbackRetry: Close - here's the correct form to learn from
dictation.perfectRun: Nearly word for word - that's mastery
dictation.aiIntro: AI turns the words you keep missing into new sentences, voiced by Supertonic, so you can practise hearing them again.
dictation.aiEmpty: No AI practice yet - do some dictation first, then generate practice from your misses.
dictation.wheelHint: Scroll sideways with a mouse or trackpad to change page
dictation.historyEmpty: No attempts yet - start a dictation session.

lessons.empty: This topic has no lessons yet

panel.selectLessonHint: Choose a topic on the left, then pick a lesson to dictate.
panel.selectLessonWelcome:
Welcome back -
pick a lesson on the left and start listening.

dictation.listenShortcutHint: Tip: press Ctrl to replay this sentence
dictation.hintLocked: Listen {{count}} more time(s) to unlock the hint
dictation.sentenceIncorrect: Not quite - fix it and check again

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary practice
vocabulary.subtitle: AI-generated cloze/multiple-choice/matching drills targeting your own weak words
vocabulary.emptyDescription: Create one and we'll target your own weak words, or let AI pick a level-appropriate set for you.
vocabulary.question: Question {{number}}
vocabulary.noHistory: No attempts yet - create a practice set to get started.

exerciseInstructions.MCQ: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:
exerciseInstructions.MATCHING: Choose the correct meaning of the word:

exerciseInstructions.MCQ: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence:
exerciseInstructions.MATCHING: Choose the correct meaning of the word:
exerciseInstructions.LISTENING_DICTATION: Listen and type the word you hear:
exerciseInstructions.TRANSLATE_EN_TO_VI: Choose the correct Vietnamese meaning of the word:
exerciseInstructions.TRANSLATE_VI_TO_EN: Choose the English word for the meaning:

library.startError: Could not start practice. Please try again.
library.answerError: Could not submit your answer. Please try again.

grammar.title: Grammar practice
grammar.subtitle: AI-generated error-correction/fill-in-tense/transform/MCQ drills targeting your own weak rules
grammar.emptyDescription: Create one and we'll target your own weak grammar rules, or let AI pick a level-appropriate set for you.
grammar.question: Question {{number}}
grammar.noHistory: No attempts yet - create a practice set to get started.

exerciseInstructions.ERROR_CORRECTION: Find and correct the mistake in the sentence below:
exerciseInstructions.FILL_TENSE: Put the verb in brackets into the correct form:
exerciseInstructions.MCQ: Choose the correct answer to complete the sentence:

library.startError: Could not start practice. Please try again.
library.answerError: Could not submit your answer. Please try again.
library.instructionsInput: Type your answer in the box below, then press "Submit".
library.retryToast: You still have wrong answers - let's redo them
library.retryUnavailable: Couldn't load the retry questions. Please go back to the topic and try again.

listening.title: Listening practice
listening.subtitle: AI-generated audio passages with multiple-choice, keyword, and open-response questions
listening.emptyDescription: Create one and we'll target your own recently-missed keywords, or let AI pick a level-appropriate topic for you.
listening.audioUnsupported: Your browser does not support audio playback.
listening.question: Question {{number}}

exerciseInstructions.MCQ: Listen to the audio, then choose the correct answer:
exerciseInstructions.KEYWORD: Listen and type the exact word/phrase you hear:
exerciseInstructions.OPEN: Listen to the audio, then answer the question below:

listening.noHistory: No attempts yet - create a practice item to get started.

library.startError: Could not start practice. Please try again.
library.answerError: Could not submit your answers. Please try again.

speaking.title: Speaking practice
speaking.subtitle: Read a Supertonic-voiced sentence aloud and get phoneme-level pronunciation feedback
speaking.emptyDescription: Create one and we'll target your own weak sounds, or let AI pick a level-appropriate sentence for you.
speaking.instruction: Read the sentence below aloud and record yourself:
speaking.micError: Couldn't access your microphone. Please check permissions.
speaking.noHistory: No attempts yet - create a practice sentence to get started.

library.startError: Could not start practice. Please try again.
library.submitError: Could not submit your recording. Please try again.
library.finishError: Could not finish this section. Please try again.

feedback.gradedOnSubmit: This response will be graded when you submit.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage how you appear and how RemeLearning reaches you.
profile.editNameDescription: This name appears on your recordings, weak points, and recommendations.
profile.photoTooLarge: Photo must be smaller than 5 MB.
